items.title: At Box, we just surveyed 1,640 IT leaders across the US, Japan, and Europe about agentic…
items.title_zh: 在 Box，我们刚刚对美国、日本和欧洲的 1,640 名 IT 领导者进行了关于代理的调查……
items.description: At Box, we just surveyed 1,640 IT leaders across the US, Japan, and Europe about agentic AI adoption. Many standout findings, but a big one was that the companies that adopted AI the most are planning to grow headcount the most. Obviously…
items.description_zh: 在 Box，我们刚刚对美国、日本和欧洲的 1,640 名 IT 领导者进行了有关代理 AI 采用情况的调查。许多引人注目的发现，但其中最重要的一点是，采用人工智能最多的公司正计划最多地增加员工人数。明显地…

meta.bio: ceo @box - your business lives in content. unleash it with AI

items.title: The centerpiece stat is a self-own: she cites a 35-year study where 12.3% of 677 gifted k…
items.title_zh: 核心统计数据是她自己的：她引用了一项为期 35 年的研究，其中 677 名有天赋的人中有 12.3% ……
items.description: The centerpiece stat is a self-own: she cites a 35-year study where 12.3% of 677 gifted kids reached "eminence" (full professor, Fortune 500 exec, federal judge) as proof the category is a lie. The general-population base rate for outcomes…
items.description_zh: 核心统计数据是她自己的：她引用了一项为期 35 年的研究，其中 677 名天才儿童中有 12.3% 达到了“杰出地位”（正教授、财富 500 强执行官、联邦法官），作为这一类别是谎言的证据。一般人群的结果基准率……

items.title: The community note clearly specifies the writer Katie Arnold-Ratliff is the one whose und…
items.title_zh: 社区注释明确指出作家凯蒂·阿诺德·拉特利夫 (Katie Arnold-Ratliff) 是一位不……
items.description: The community note clearly specifies the writer Katie Arnold-Ratliff is the one whose understanding of gifted is inherently flawed Stop making it cool for writers to in-group signal with lies https://t.co/QSxcjimgYa
items.description_zh: 社区说明明确指出作家凯蒂·阿诺德-拉特利夫 (Katie Arnold-Ratliff) 对天才的理解本质上是有缺陷的，不要让作家在群体内用谎言发出信号变得很酷 https://t.co/QSxcjimgYa
